title: CensorADMET: research software and reproducibility package
description: CensorADMET implements controllable constraint-satisficing regression for censored ADMET measurements. This frozen release contains the source code, curated ChEMBL 36-derived benchmark inputs, fixed split assignments, experiment configuration, result artifacts, figure and table scripts, tests, provenance material, and result-verification tooling used for the accompanying manuscript.

creators.name: Mitropoulou, Evangelia
creators.affiliation: Foundation for Research and Technology Hellas (FORTH), Institute of Chemical Engineering Sciences (ICE-HT)
